name: Public joint stock company NPO Nauka
summary: Public joint stock company NPO Nauka manufactures and sells aerospace equipment in Russia and internationally. It offers products, such as dehumidifiers, dampers, valves, pneumatic controls, ground control boards, pressure regulators, heat exchangers, turbo refrigerators, air controlling units, filters, and air ejectors, as well as electronic control and monitoring units, signaling devices, and regulators. The company also provides services, such as design support, architectural supervision, testing center services, test and control laboratory, and implementation of unclaimed components. Public joint stock company NPO Nauka was founded in 1893 and is based in Moscow, Russia.
